name: toon
description: Act as a TOON Protocol client from Claude: pay-to-write Nostr over Interledger — publish, free reads, payment channels, swaps, and rendered feeds.
long_description: TOON is pay-to-write Nostr over Interledger: reads are free, writes spend a payment-channel claim. This extension runs the `toon-mcp` stdio server, which auto-spawns a local `toon-clientd` daemon (held in your home directory) to manage chain keys and payment channels. Tools cover publishing, reading/subscribing, channel & balance management, multi-chain swaps, and rendering TOON events, feeds, profiles, and threads into an interactive UI. No configuration required — an identity is generated on first run.
